_comment_hash: SHA256 digest below is from the v2.0.6 GitHub Release (published 2026-04-22). Do not invent digests.
_comment_bin: Binary is az-ai-v2.exe during the dual-binary transition. Post-cutover the rename to az-ai.exe lands in a follow-up manifest update.
_comment_notice: Scoop has no doc directory concept, so the release tarball must place NOTICE + THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md + LICENSE at the extraction root next to az-ai-v2.exe. post_install surfaces their paths to the user so Lippman's 'all distributed artifacts include NOTICE' claim holds for Windows installs.
_comment_pin: Versioned-pin support: sibling versions/ directory holds az-ai-v2@<version>.json manifests so users can `scoop install schwartzkamel/az-ai-v2@2.0.6`. Follows scoopinstaller/versions bucket conventions.
_comment_filename_clean: v2.0.6 rolls all version strings in lock-step with the tag (verify-version-strings.sh gate 4 green) — the v2.0.4 tarball-filename drift (audit finding C-1) is resolved. URL uses the clean az-ai-v2-$version-win-x64.zip pattern again; autoupdate can therefore rely on $version substitution mechanically.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI v2 — AOT agent with Microsoft Agent Framework, personas/squads, cost estimator
post_install: Write-Host 'az-ai-v2 installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
